## User interaction layer (User Interface)
Handles all communication with users:
- receives messages/photos
- sends instructions & results**

## Conversation engine (Logic)
Handles all communication with users:
Controls user flow:
reservation → upload type → area → photo
Maintains session state

## Routing and control (Flow control)
Routes actions and decisions:
- what to do next
- when to run AI vs wait
